articles.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR — 0.6B Open-Source Speech Model
articles.shortDescription: NVIDIA dropped Nemotron 3.5 ASR, a 0.6B open-source streaming ASR model with 40+ languages, 80ms latency.
articles.fullSummary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3.5 ASR — 600M param open-source speech recognition for real-time streaming. 40+ languages, 80ms latency, 17x more throughput than Parakeet 1.1B.
